name: Jimmy Fallon
description: American talk show host and comedian (born 1974)
abstract: James Thomas Fallon (born September 19, 1974) is an American comedian, television host, actor, singer, writer, and producer, best known for his work in television. Fallon grew up with a love of comedy and music, moving to Los Angeles when he turned 21 to pursue stand-up comedy.

about_quotes.speaker: Alcide "Slow Drag" Pavageau
about_quotes.evidence: There was Billy Murray at bass, Jimmy Fallon's violin, and they had this Mick Murray on the drum.

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Love
about_quotes.evidence: And then all at once he picked up and he left there with Jimmy Fallon and then we went north.
